session.user:
Run the following command and report the results: uv run pytest tests/commands/test_reconcile.py -v
Report all test results, pass/fail status, and any error messages in full.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_reconcile.py with verbose output
